query: SELECT id, title, pillar, LENGTH(body) as body_length, readTime, published, createdAt FROM posts ORDER BY body_length ASC LIMIT 50
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R8Hw4VBpxrrDge.root --database KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG --execute SELECT id, title, pillar, LENGTH(body) as body_length, readTime, published, createdAt FROM posts ORDER BY body_length ASC LIMIT 50
